title: Authorization, Tenancy, Object, Function, and Property Policy · Inference Brief: Denial Disclosure Audit
summary: Routes check a broad role but not object ownership, tenant filters are optional, update bodies bind protected fields, and denials leak which records exist. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts denial disclosure audit increment in deny-by-default resource authorization decision. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose 401, 403, or concealed 404 behavior consistently and preserve bounded decision evidence without leaking sensitive resource existence or policy internals.
Allowlist writable and readable properties and privileged functions so mass assignment, hidden fields, and broad serializers cannot bypass policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Denial Disclosure Audit · Theory Denial Disclosure Audit
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 9988 in a public incident API behind one regional edge proxy. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to enforce tenant, object action, and property policy as one deny-by-default decision; retain a screen-reader-readable decision trace; then remove one trusted proxy hop and recompute authority from the socket boundary. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Denial Disclosure Audit contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Node and Express server Predict Denial Disclosure Audit · Theory Denial Disclosure Audit.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose 401, 403, or concealed 404 behavior consistently and preserve bounded decision evidence without leaking sensitive resource existence or policy internals. For Node and Express server Predict Denial Disclosure Audit · Theory Denial Disclosure Audit, keep Denial Disclosure Audit connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
